title: ProviderResourceDescriptor
description:
Provisional alpha descriptor for a provider-hosted resource.

Describes a single discoverable resource (repository, folder, channel, document, board, etc.) that a provider exposes. Carries provider-neutral metadata about the resource's identity, capabilities, and freshness â€” nothing about governance, review, signoff, or binding approval.

captured_at.description: When this descriptor was captured from the provider (ISO-8601).

display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the resource.

parent.description: Parent resource reference, if this resource is nested.

permission.description: Current permission state for the authenticated connection.

provider_metadata.description: Provider-supplied metadata that does not fit the typed fields above. Must not contain secrets, tokens, credentials, or PII.

uri.description: Canonical URI for the resource on the provider (e.g. HTTPS URL).

FreshnessMetadata.description: Provider-reported freshness metadata for a resource or item.

etag.description: Provider-reported entity tag or revision identifier.

item_count.description: Provider-reported item or version count, if available.

PermissionState.description: Permission state for the authenticated connection to a resource.

oneOf.description: Permission has not been evaluated yet.
Permission is insufficient; action is needed.
Permission was explicitly denied by the provider.

ResourceCapability.description: Provider-neutral capability that a resource supports.

oneOf.description: Individual items within the resource can be read.
Items within the resource can be searched.
The provider can deliver change notifications for this resource.
Items within the resource can be fetched incrementally.

ResourceRef.description: Lightweight reference to a parent or related resource.

resource_id.description: Provider-scoped identifier of the referenced resource.
